title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 5, 2024
summary: December 5, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a higher rate of 6.22% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 4.66%), from the level on 11/28/2024 of 10.048 M km 2 to 10.714 M km 2 for this week Plot Compiled by: Howard J. title: DMV Update
summary: The city is accepting applications for the recently reposted DMV position. Currently, we do not have a date for reopening. We appreciate your patience and understanding during this time. The job description and application can be found on the City of Cordova website at: www.cityofcordova.net/careers...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 2 December, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 2 December, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Family Justice Center Survey
summary: Kawerak is exploring the development of a Family Justice Center in Nome. A Family Justice Center (FJC) is a community-based center where survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, and other family-related trauma can access a range of essential support and services in one place.
